## Checklist

- [ ] The change is stack-neutral or clearly marked as an example.
- [ ] The change does not make AEON company-specific.
- [ ] The change improves objectivity, safety, clarity, documentation, testing, frontend quality, or code economy.
- [ ] The change does not encourage hallucination or unverified claims.
- [ ] The change avoids unnecessary length.
